events.summary: C6 Phase 0 (Research) initialized. Research.md authored (12 sections, ~360 lines). Scope: replace fixed PPL with user-defined custom programs. Data model: customPrograms[] + customDay + exerciseSlot with exerciseID reference. 4 starter templates (PPL/UL/FB3/Empty). NO destructive migration — fixed PPL stays as fallback. Depends on C3 (PR #573) shipping exercise library picker. Out-of-scope guards (8 explicit). 8 new training_-prefixed analytics events. Phase 4 LoC estimate ~1700. Phase E compliant. 4-6 person-days effort.
